name: Akumajou Densetsu

access.notes: Japanese Famicom version with enhanced VRC6 audio.

backlog.reason: Definitive Famicom version of Castlevania III with superior music and balancing.

acquisition.reason: Historically important Japanese variant showcasing enhanced Famicom cartridge hardware.

notes: Features Konami VRC6 enhanced audio unavailable in the NES release.
